model.dynamic_components: must not overlap with prescribed_components or omitted_components

embedded_components.rule: embedded cannot appear in coupled_components; no cyclic embedding

typical_patterns.land_ice → anywhere: unusual — flag if embedded without explanation

model.coupled_components: only superior hosts (non-embedded) may couple; all must be directly/indirectly connected

model_component.name: version strings use hyphens not dots — v1-1 not v1.1
model_component.references: expected to be present; flag if absent

component_config.horizontal_grid_domain_match: grid domain must match component type — e.g. ocean_biogeochemistry must not reference an atmospheric grid

vertical_grid_domain_match.land_surface: should have a soil-depth vertical grid, not an atmospheric one

grid_type_domain_rules.tripolar|displaced_pole: ocean/sea_ice only — flag if atmosphere or land

spectral_resolution_formulas.rule: determine grid_type before flagging; if ambiguous raise NOTE not WARNING

horizontal_grid_cell.region_mismatch: ocean component grid claiming 'arctic' only is unusual without explanation
horizontal_grid_cell.horizontal_units_km: valid on any grid_type including regular_lat_lon — do not flag

vertical_grid.z_star_note: z* is the canonical form; do not flag it as non-standard
